capabilities.name: Social Account Management
capabilities.description: Configure and manage social media accounts across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, and YouTube. Handle OAuth authorization, page linking, and account permissions.
examples: Connect a Facebook Page to Odoo Social Marketing
Link a LinkedIn company page for publishing
Troubleshoot an expired Instagram access token
Configure multi-company social account isolation

capabilities.name: Multi-Platform Publishing
capabilities.description: Create and publish social.post records across one or more platforms with per-platform formatting and live post tracking.
examples: Publish a post to Facebook, LinkedIn, and X simultaneously
Handle a failed post and retry manually
Draft a post with platform-specific copy variants
Create text-only, image, and video posts

capabilities.name: Post Scheduling & Cron
capabilities.description: Schedule posts via scheduled_date and manage the social publishing cron that posts due content.
examples: Schedule a campaign post for next Tuesday at 9am
Debug why scheduled posts are not publishing
Bulk reschedule posts for a different campaign
Configure the social posting cron frequency

capabilities.name: Social Media Attachments
capabilities.description: Attach images and videos to posts, validate platform-specific media requirements, and link attachments to live posts.
examples: Attach an image to a Facebook post
Validate video size for Instagram
Add multiple images to a LinkedIn carousel
Troubleshoot media upload failures

capabilities.name: Stream Monitoring
capabilities.description: Create social streams and collect stream posts for mentions, hashtags, pages, and engagement tracking.
examples: Monitor a Twitter hashtag in a social stream
Track Facebook page mentions
Configure stream refresh intervals
Analyze engagement from collected stream posts

capabilities.name: Campaign & UTM Tracking
capabilities.description: Link social posts to UTM campaigns and track source/medium/campaign attribution for social traffic.
examples: Create a social post linked to a UTM campaign
Report social campaign performance by platform
Set up UTM parameters for social traffic
Track conversions from a social campaign

capabilities.name: AI-Generated Content
capabilities.description: Generate social post content using ai.agent, including copy suggestions, hashtags, and tone adjustment.
examples: Generate Facebook post copy from a blog URL
Suggest hashtags for an Instagram post
Adjust tone to professional for LinkedIn
Create campaign posts from a product description

capabilities.name: Social Marketing Security
capabilities.description: Configure social marketing user/manager groups, ACLs, and record rules for multi-company/account isolation.
examples: Assign social marketing manager permissions
Restrict an account to a specific company
Configure who can publish posts
Set up stream access control

capabilities.name: Social Analytics & Reporting
capabilities.description: Read engagement metrics from live posts and build reports on social performance by platform, account, and campaign.
examples: Build a dashboard of posts by platform
Compare engagement across campaigns
Export social performance metrics
Track follower growth from streams
